name: Cloud AI Discovery (Shadow AI / AI-SPM)
description: Agentless discovery of AI/LLM services across your cloud accounts (AWS Bedrock / SageMaker, Azure OpenAI / ML, GCP Vertex AI) — the AI-SPM inventory layer. Each discovered model/endpoint becomes an AISYSTEM (provider / model / hosting / endpoint, Discovered=1, DiscoverySource); any that aren't already governed (no owner, no framework) surface as Shadow AI on /ai-systems. Reads from the cloud control plane (no agent). Config: per-cloud read-only credentials in the worker environment (AWS_*, AZURE_*, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS); or pass `file` = a saved discovery export JSON (or run with no config for the bundled sample).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved cloud-AI discovery export JSON
